series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents sent to DAS HRD Payroll identifying individuals ODOT has hired or contracted with (i.e. not ODOT staff). This is used to identify additional work performed by state or non-state workers for work that is not applicable towards OPERS retirement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years close of fiscal year. ; Electronic: two years close of fiscal year
